violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee Line cook did not wash hands as necessary. Employee must wash hands in between changing gloves.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of Reach-in-coolers need cleaned of food debris.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of reach-in-freezers need cleaned of food debris. All handles and doors of coolers and freezers need cleaned.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * . Dishwasher tested at "0" sanitizer due to the sani container was empty.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The reach in cooler by the door to the kitchen had products temping between 50 degrees and 62 degrees. The air temp when tested was 63 degrees. Items were moved to another cooler and walk in. The front salad cooler had products temping between 50 and 53 degrees. The air temp was 53.2 degrees.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The gasket on the walk in cooler needs to be cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. The wall in the stall of the men’s restroom had a hole and missing wall tile.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor tile were broken and missing in the dish area, by the mop sink, back hand sink, three compartment sink.

Lighting. — --Light intensity for areas of handwash, warewash, equipment/utensil storage, food offering or toilet room * was insufficient. The light over the food prep and three compartment sink area was not working. This area did not have enough illumination to visually see cleanliness issues.--Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light shields were missing from lights in the dish and prep areas.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
